headline: American Express releases January 2026 delinquency and write-off statistics for U.S. Consumer and Small Business Card Member loans.
investor_impact: The release of monthly credit metrics shows stable consumer credit health with U.S. Consumer net write-offs improving slightly to 1.9% from 2.1% in December, while Small Business write-offs ticked up to 2.8%. These figures are critical for analysts modeling provision for credit losses and assessing broader macroeconomic consumer trends.
key_figures: U.S. Consumer 30 days past due rate (Jan 2026): 1.4%
Total U.S. Small Business loans (Jan 2026): $31.4 billion
U.S. Small Business 30 days past due rate (Jan 2026): 1.7%
U.S. Small Business net write-off rate (Jan 2026): 2.8%
Total Card Member loans held for investment (Jan 2026): $128.6 billion
